title: Advanced Algorithms
description: Design and analysis of advanced algorithms: amortized analysis, randomized and approximation algorithms, network flows, and NP-completeness.

title: Distributed Systems
description: Principles of distributed systems: consistency, consensus, replication, fault tolerance, and the design of scalable services.

title: Cloud-Native Application Architecture
description: Architecting cloud-native applications with containers, microservices, REST and event-driven APIs, and CI/CD pipelines.

title: Artificial Intelligence
description: Graduate survey of artificial intelligence: search, probabilistic reasoning, knowledge representation, and modern neural methods.

title: Statistical Foundations of Data Science
description: Statistical foundations for data science: estimation, inference, regression, and experimental design with hands-on analysis.

title: Machine Learning
description: Supervised and unsupervised machine learning, model selection and evaluation, and production-grade ML pipelines. A popular core course that fills quickly.

title: Big Data Systems
description: Distributed storage and large-scale processing: partitioning, replication, MapReduce, and modern streaming architectures.

title: Mathematical Methods for Scientists & Engineers
description: Mathematical methods for graduate science and engineering: linear algebra, differential equations, transforms, and numerical methods.

title: Applied Linear Algebra
description: Applied linear algebra for computation and data: matrix decompositions, eigenproblems, least squares, and spectral methods.

title: Graduate Classical Mechanics
description: Graduate classical mechanics: Lagrangian and Hamiltonian formulations, central forces, rigid bodies, and an introduction to chaos.

title: Quantum Mechanics
description: Quantum mechanics at the graduate level: formalism, perturbation theory, angular momentum, and applications to modern physics.

title: Molecular & Cellular Biology
description: Molecular and cellular biology: gene regulation, signaling, the cytoskeleton, and experimental techniques in modern biology.

title: Advanced Physical Chemistry
description: Advanced physical chemistry: thermodynamics, statistical mechanics, chemical kinetics, and an introduction to quantum chemistry.

title: Engineering Systems Design
description: The engineering design process applied to complex systems: requirements, modeling, prototyping, and verification through team projects.

title: Embedded Systems & Electronics
description: Design and analysis of embedded systems and electronics: microcontrollers, real-time control, and mixed-signal circuits.

title: Technology Entrepreneurship
description: From research to venture: customer discovery, lean startups, product-market fit, intellectual property, and pitching deep-tech ideas to investors.
